member.name: T:EVEIPH_Updater.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:EVEIPH_Updater.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:EVEIPH_Updater.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: M:EVEIPH_Updater.FrmUpdaterMain.CreateNewDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: This will create a new directory. If the directory already exists it will delete it first.
